text: I would be describing Professor Dr. Lequalia's technique in performing the utility incision for Bart's right upper lobectomy.
As you can see, the incision is almost 5 cm in diameter anterior to the anterior border of latissimus dorsi muscle and just posterior to the anterior axillary fold.
After doing the incision, the alexis is being inserted as shown.
Then the pleural cavity is explored by the camera.
